item.title: Hello World
item.author: suryanj@proton.me (SNJ)
item.description: This is the beginning of my logging as well as the self hosting journey. Running on the latest fedora workstation 44 onmy own hardware an old Laptop I had, via cloudflare tunnels.
item.content: This is the beginning of my logging as well as the self hosting journey. Running on the latest fedora workstation 44 onmy own hardware an old Laptop I had, via cloudflare tunnels.
